{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Thunderhoof Grazer
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Thunderhoof Grazers are creatures that can sleep.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
